query:
-- Drop any prior README seed rows still pending so we don't double-stack
DELETE FROM drive_push_queue
WHERE file_name = 'README.md'
  AND status = 'pending'
  AND file_key LIKE 'seed/readme/%';

-- Now seed one README per canonical subfolder.
-- target_subpath is left null since READMEs sit at the subfolder root, not month buckets.
INSERT INTO drive_push_queue (file_key, file_url, file_name, mime_type, content_text, target_subpath, target_folder, status, created_at)
VALUES
-- ASSIGNMENTS AND WORK
('seed/readme/finished_work', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Finished Work\n\nReagan''s completed assignments, photos of finished worksheets, and turn-in submissions land here automatically when she marks a block done in the dashboard.\n\n- Source: Reagan''s Homeschool Dashboard → Submissions / Photos of Work\n- Auto-refresh: every morning at 7 AM ET\n- Do not manually delete files here — the dashboard treats them as the system of record.\n', NULL, 'finished_work', 'pending', NOW()),

('seed/readme/reagan_assignments', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Assignments\n\nActive worksheets, lessons, and assignments Reagan still needs to do.\n\n- Source: dashboard → Today / Assignments queue\n- Auto-refresh: every morning at 7 AM ET\n', NULL, 'reagan_assignments', 'pending', NOW()),

('seed/readme/worksheets', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Worksheets (Daily Packets)\n\nPrintable daily packets generated from each day''s schedule. One PDF per day, organized by date.\n', NULL, 'worksheets', 'pending', NOW()),

('seed/readme/practice', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Practice for Coins\n\nExtra practice worksheets Reagan completes for Kiwi Coin rewards.\n', NULL, 'practice', 'pending', NOW()),

-- DAILY OPERATIONS
('seed/readme/daily_schedule', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Daily Schedule\n\nGenerated agendas + plan PDFs for each school day.\n', NULL, 'daily_schedule', 'pending', NOW()),

('seed/readme/agenda_pdf', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Daily Agenda PDFs\n\nNightly-emailed agenda PDFs, archived by month.\n\n- Filename: `{YYYY-MM-DD} - Agenda.pdf`\n- Subfolder: `{YYYY-MM}` (e.g. `2026-05`)\n- Recipients this week (through Tue May 26 2026): spear.cpt@gmail.com\n', NULL, 'agenda_pdf', 'pending', NOW()),

('seed/readme/day_log', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Day Logs\n\nMarkdown summary of what Reagan actually did each day (vs the plan). Auto-generated at end of day.\n\n- Filename: `{YYYY-MM-DD} - Day Log.md`\n- Subfolder: `{YYYY-MM}`\n', NULL, 'day_log', 'pending', NOW()),

('seed/readme/recap_reply', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Recap Replies\n\nEmailed recap responses from Mom / Grandma / tutor archived by month. Used by the AI to fill in what actually happened on days the dashboard wasn''t opened.\n', NULL, 'recap_reply', 'pending', NOW()),

-- CURRICULUM AND RESOURCES
('seed/readme/topics_covered', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Topics Covered\n\nOne markdown file per (date, subject, topic) — every standard or topic Reagan worked on. Used for the curriculum-coverage checklist.\n', NULL, 'topics_covered', 'pending', NOW()),

('seed/readme/curriculum_checklist', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Curriculum Checklist (Weekly)\n\nAuto-rebuilt weekly 5th-grade Ohio curriculum checklist showing what''s covered vs pending.\n', NULL, 'curriculum_checklist', 'pending', NOW()),

-- PRINTABLES AND RESOURCES
('seed/readme/printables', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Printables\n\nMaster library of printable worksheets, coloring pages, and activity sheets the dashboard can attach to any block.\n', NULL, 'printables', 'pending', NOW()),

-- PROGRESS AND REPORTS
('seed/readme/report_cards', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Report Cards\n\nWeekly and quarterly summaries of completion %, grades, mood, and topics covered.\n', NULL, 'report_cards', 'pending', NOW()),

('seed/readme/analytics', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Analytics\n\nCSV / JSON exports of completion, engagement, and time-on-task. Mom-only.\n', NULL, 'analytics', 'pending', NOW()),

('seed/readme/apps_tools', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Apps and Tools\n\nSnapshots of Reagan''s usage of IXL, Khan Academy, Prodigy, BrainPOP, Edpuzzle, Vocabulary.com, Merlin Bird ID, iNaturalist.\n', NULL, 'apps_tools', 'pending', NOW()),

('seed/readme/kiwi_coins', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Kiwi Coins\n\nReagan''s coin ledger — earnings, redemptions, and prize history.\n', NULL, 'kiwi_coins', 'pending', NOW()),

-- ADMIN AND RECORDS
('seed/readme/adult_notes', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Adult Notes\n\nPrivate notes from Mom + Grandma + tutor. Not visible to Reagan.\n', NULL, 'adult_notes', 'pending', NOW()),

('seed/readme/tutor', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Tutor Handoffs\n\nDaily tutor handoff notes, IEP accommodations, and session summaries.\n\nNote (May 21 2026): Sophie is the active tutor through Tue May 26 2026. After that, no tutor uploads expected. Keith is OFF.\n', NULL, 'tutor', 'pending', NOW()),

('seed/readme/notebook', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Notebook\n\nAdult notebook entries — quick notes, observations, behavior tracking.\n', NULL, 'notebook', 'pending', NOW()),

-- ADVENTURES AND ENRICHMENT
('seed/readme/bookshelf', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Bookshelf\n\nReading log + uploads. Books Reagan owns: Tuck Everlasting, Michael''s World, Spectrum Science Grade 5, 180 Days of Language for 5th Grade.\n', NULL, 'bookshelf', 'pending', NOW()),

('seed/readme/adventures', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Adventures\n\nAdventure of the Day entries + photos. Weighted toward birds, animals, plants, water, swimming, and outdoors.\n', NULL, 'adventures', 'pending', NOW()),

('seed/readme/journal', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Journal\n\nReagan''s notebook entries — reading reflections, feelings, mood (green/yellow/red), weekly reflections.\n', NULL, 'journal', 'pending', NOW()),

-- INBOX (catch-all)
('seed/readme/reagan', NULL, 'README.md', 'text/markdown',
'# Inbox (Unsorted)\n\nCatch-all for files the auto-router couldn''t classify. Mom triages these into the right canonical folder when she has a moment.\n', NULL, 'reagan', 'pending', NOW());
